scripts.build:preview: VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://all-about-me-api.asehee127.workers.dev npm run sitemap:generate && npm run build
scripts.build:prod: sh -c 'test -n "$VITE_API_BASE_URL" || { echo "VITE_API_BASE_URL is required"; exit 1; }; npm run sitemap:generate && npm run build'
scripts.worker:secret:auth: sh -c 'test -n "$AUTH_BEARER_TOKEN" || { echo "AUTH_BEARER_TOKEN is required"; exit 1; }; printf "%s" "$AUTH_BEARER_TOKEN" | wrangler secret put AUTH_BEARER_TOKEN --config wrangler.toml'
scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply journal-db --local --config wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply journal-db --remote --config wrangler.toml
scripts.pages:deploy:preview: npm run build:preview && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name new-project --branch all-about-me --commit-dirty=true
scripts.pages:deploy:prod: npm run build:prod && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name new-project --branch production --commit-dirty=true
scripts.release:prod:auth: npm run d1:migrate:remote && npm run worker:secret:auth && npm run worker:deploy && npm run pages:deploy:prod
